<?php declare(strict_types=1); /** * This file is part of phpDocumentor. * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. * * @link http://phpdoc.org */ namespace phpDocumentor\Reflection\DocBlock\Tags\Reference; use Webmozart\Assert\Assert; /** * Url reference used by {@see \phpDocumentor\Reflection\DocBlock\Tags\See} */ final class Url implements Reference { private string $uri; public function __construct(string $uri) { Assert::stringNotEmpty($uri); $this->uri = $uri; } public function __toString(): string { return $this->uri; } }
